recent_decisions.reflection: My last prediction (Mar 2 EOD) was UP target 1.50 for silver — CATASTROPHICALLY WRONG. Silver crashed from 0.64 to 1.45 (-10.1% overnight/today). The tight stops on silver301 (15.73) guaranteed a stop-out on this size move. silver_sg held longer but the -15% crash was too much. The bull thesis was right for 5 weeks but we gave back all gains in 1 day. Key lesson: overnight gap risk in silver is real — need wider stops or no overnight holds on leveraged products during volatile periods.
